steps.title: Use the complexity clue
steps.content: The protozoan Stentor roeseli not only uses escape strategies but switches strategies when one fails. The phrase "not be limited to" signals that this evidence goes beyond the simple behavior expected of single-celled organisms.

steps.title: Choose simple behavior
steps.content: A describes hostility, C describes changing over generations, and D describes usefulness. "Rudimentary" means basic or elementary, which matches the contrast between simple behavior and sophisticated strategy-switching. The answer is B.
